mission_title: Agent Fox Technical Core V1A-3G — Shared Self-Knowledge Chat Adapter Core

argv:
from pathlib import Path
import ast
import hashlib
import inspect
import json

root = Path("Z:/FOXAI")
drop = root / "AGENT_FOX_V1A3G"
installed = root / "System/AgentFoxTechnicalCore"
checks = [
    (drop / "self_knowledge_chat_adapter_v1.py", installed / "self_knowledge_chat_adapter_v1.py", "a80a9047e0eebd9ac87fe4d656c565bc6534563bb3c97e1ad9b59823a36804f7"),
    (drop / "SELF_KNOWLEDGE_CHAT_ADAPTER_CONTRACT_V1.json", installed / "SELF_KNOWLEDGE_CHAT_ADAPTER_CONTRACT_V1.json", "76d039ce10fe0229c5db0901b8c669110ceed66db9fff22e594b0f19092d216b"),
    (drop / "README_V1A3G.md", installed / "README_V1A3G.md", "8e4f743ffe3ed06700c5727a977db7af8eabad094cedacf3e88ec1daa2c6346b"),
]
for source, target, expected_hash in checks:
    assert source.is_file(), source
    assert target.is_file(), target
    assert hashlib.sha256(source.read_bytes()).hexdigest() == expected_hash
    assert hashlib.sha256(target.read_bytes()).hexdigest() == expected_hash
script_text = (installed / "self_knowledge_chat_adapter_v1.py").read_text(encoding="utf-8")
compile(script_text, str(installed / "self_knowledge_chat_adapter_v1.py"), "exec")
tree = ast.parse(script_text)
imports = set()
route = None
for node in ast.walk(tree):
    if isinstance(node, ast.Import):
        imports.update(alias.name.split(".")[0] for alias in node.names)
    elif isinstance(node, ast.ImportFrom) and node.module:
        imports.add(node.module.split(".")[0])
    elif isinstance(node, ast.FunctionDef) and node.name == "route_message":
        route = node
forbidden = {
    "subprocess", "socket", "urllib", "http", "ftplib", "requests",
    "pip", "ensurepip", "psutil", "winreg", "ctypes", "webbrowser", "importlib",
}
assert not (imports & forbidden), sorted(imports & forbidden)
assert route is not None
assert [arg.arg for arg in route.args.args] == ["message", "surface", "request_id", "selectors"]
assert len(route.args.defaults) == 2
contract = json.loads((installed / "SELF_KNOWLEDGE_CHAT_ADAPTER_CONTRACT_V1.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
assert contract["mission_id"] == "ENG-20260722-005700-10980D"
assert contract["supported_surfaces"] == ["webui", "desktop"]
assert contract["supported_intent_count"] == 11
assert contract["verified_evidence_set_count"] == 3
assert contract["verified_authoritative_output_count"] == 19
assert contract["total_test_count"] == 90
assert contract["expected_claim_provenance_record_count"] == 480
assert len(contract["outputs"]) == 6
assert contract["scope"]["unsupported_chat_registry_read_allowed"] is False
assert contract["scope"]["existing_foxai_chat_source_modified"] is False
print("AGENT_FOX_V1A3G_INSTALL_PREFLIGHT_OK")
validations.name: Verify exact V1A-3G payloads, callable signature, contract, syntax, and standard-library safety
Run deterministic request-ID, recognition-gate, unresolved-label, and provenance renderer self-tests
Hash-verify V1A-3D, V1A-3E, V1A-3F evidence sets and the installed V1A-3E bridge
Run all 90 dual-surface routing, pass-through, ambiguity, provenance, uncertainty, and copied-fixture corruption tests

validations.name: Build exactly six V1A-3G adapter API, routing, rendering, test, coverage, and receipt outputs
Validate exact six-file output set, deterministic hashes, bounds, dual-surface coverage, and test results

argv:
from pathlib import Path
import json
index = Path(r"Z:/FOXAI/System/EngineeringWorkshop/missions/ENG-20260722-005700-10980D_V1A3G_SHARED_SELF_KNOWLEDGE_CHAT_ADAPTER")
api = json.loads((index / "SELF_KNOWLEDGE_CHAT_ADAPTER_API.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
routing = json.loads((index / "SELF_KNOWLEDGE_CHAT_ADAPTER_ROUTING.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
examples = json.loads((index / "SELF_KNOWLEDGE_CHAT_ADAPTER_RENDERING_EXAMPLES.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
assert api["callable"] == "route_message(message, surface, request_id=None, selectors=None)"
assert api["supported_surfaces"] == ["webui", "desktop"]
assert api["supported_intent_count"] == 11
assert len(routing["rules"]) == 4
rules = {row["class"]: row for row in routing["rules"]}
assert rules["recognized"]["model_bypass"] is True
assert rules["ambiguous_supported"]["model_bypass"] is True
assert rules["unsupported_ordinary"]["ordinary_chat_pass_through"] is True
assert rules["unsupported_ordinary"]["registry_verification"] is False
assert rules["recognized_evidence_failure"]["ordinary_chat_pass_through"] is False
statuses = {row["status"] for row in examples["examples"]}
assert {"answered", "clarification_required", "pass_through"}.issubset(statuses)
print("AGENT_FOX_V1A3G_ROUTE_OUTPUTS_OK")
validations.name: Validate recognized, ambiguous, unsupported, and evidence-failure routing contracts from generated outputs

argv:
from pathlib import Path
import json
index = Path(r"Z:/FOXAI/System/EngineeringWorkshop/missions/ENG-20260722-005700-10980D_V1A3G_SHARED_SELF_KNOWLEDGE_CHAT_ADAPTER")
expected = {
    "SELF_KNOWLEDGE_CHAT_ADAPTER_API.json",
    "SELF_KNOWLEDGE_CHAT_ADAPTER_ROUTING.json",
    "SELF_KNOWLEDGE_CHAT_ADAPTER_RENDERING_EXAMPLES.json",
    "SELF_KNOWLEDGE_CHAT_ADAPTER_TEST_MATRIX.json",
    "SELF_KNOWLEDGE_CHAT_ADAPTER_COVERAGE.json",
    "SELF_KNOWLEDGE_CHAT_ADAPTER_RECEIPT.json",
}
actual = {path.name for path in index.iterdir() if path.is_file()}
assert actual == expected, (sorted(actual), sorted(expected))
coverage = json.loads((index / "SELF_KNOWLEDGE_CHAT_ADAPTER_COVERAGE.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
tests = json.loads((index / "SELF_KNOWLEDGE_CHAT_ADAPTER_TEST_MATRIX.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
receipt = json.loads((index / "SELF_KNOWLEDGE_CHAT_ADAPTER_RECEIPT.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
assert coverage["supported_intent_count"] == 11
assert coverage["v1a3e_test_case_execution_count"] == 68
assert coverage["total_test_count"] == 90
assert coverage["claim_provenance_record_count"] == 480
assert coverage["registry_reads_for_unsupported_chat"] == 0
assert coverage["workshop_python_alias_resolved"] is False
assert coverage["pythonw_identity_directly_probed"] is False
assert coverage["runtime_facts_inferred_across_contexts"] is False
assert coverage["closure_node_records_copied"] == 0
assert coverage["closure_edge_records_copied"] == 0
assert coverage["live_foxai_source_scans"] == 0
assert coverage["imported_live_foxai_modules"] == 0
assert coverage["child_processes"] == 0
assert coverage["network_used"] is False
assert coverage["packages_installed"] is False
assert coverage["models_loaded"] is False
assert coverage["existing_foxai_chat_source_modified"] is False
assert tests["test_count"] == 90
assert all(row["passed"] for row in tests["rows"])
assert receipt["exact_output_count_including_receipt"] == 6
assert receipt["internal_deterministic_rebuild_match"] is True
assert receipt["total_output_bytes"] < 8388608
print("AGENT_FOX_V1A3G_SAFETY_BOUNDARIES_OK")
validations.name: Validate unresolved-runtime preservation, zero registry reads for unsupported chat, zero live integration, and all safety boundaries
